evals.expected_output: Should resolve item #5 (Pre-trade balance validation), read 1-investigate.md prompt, fill {{ITEM_NUMBER}} with 5 and {{ITEM_DESCRIPTION}} with the full item text, dispatch a general-purpose subagent with the filled prompt, then present investigation output and ask user to proceed/re-run/abort.

assertions.text: Correctly resolved to work item #5 (Pre-trade balance validation)
Read the prompt template from prompts/1-investigate.md
Filled {{ITEM_NUMBER}} with 5 and {{ITEM_DESCRIPTION}} with the full item text including Source, Problem, Proposed, Scope fields
Dispatches a general-purpose subagent (not Explore or Plan)
Presents a gate asking user to proceed, re-run, or abort
Announces starting the pipeline for item #5

evals.expected_output: Should read work-items.md, find item #5 as the next undone item (since #1-4 are all done), announce pipeline start, then proceed to Stage 1 investigation.

assertions.text: Correctly identified #5 as the next undone item by checking which items are marked Done
Read the prompt template from prompts/1-investigate.md
Filled {{ITEM_NUMBER}} with 5 and {{ITEM_DESCRIPTION}} with the full item text
Presents a gate asking user to proceed, re-run, or abort
Announces starting the pipeline for item #5

evals.expected_output: Should match the name to item #5, extract its full description, and start the pipeline with Stage 1 investigation.

assertions.text: Matched 'pre-trade balance validation' to work item #5 by name
